tracks.rawText: 0:06[Rec] Apr 28 09:37:51UploadLatin pop with reggaeton influences, The arrangement features a prominent nylon-string acoustic guitar playing syncopated rhythmic chords and melodic fills, A high-pitched, percussive synth lead plays a repetitive four-note hook, The percussion consists of a standard dembow rhythm with a heavy kick drum and crisp snares, A male tenor vocal delivers melodic lines with rhythmic phrasing, The bass is a deep, sub-heavy synth that follows the chord progression, Key of G minor, Tempo 95 BPM, 4/4 time signaturePublishRemix

tracks.rawText: 1:48Studio Selectionv5.5CoverRap con trompetas al frente: stabs de trompeta con mute y fraseos en respuesta al vocal, beats boom-bap/trap híbridos con kick seco, snare con rimshot, hi-hats abiertos y rolls, 808 sub grave, filtros low-pass en el pre-coro y sintes estéreo anchos en el hook, Sección donde “rap, rap, rap” entra como percusión vocal, en staccato, con delay corto y paneo rítmico1PublishRemix
